steps.t: The dwarf-merchant Onar is in the hamlet of Needlehole in the north-west corner of Rushock Bog. Hyacinth only needs brimstone and iron filings to get …
Hyacinth Took is in Tuckborough, near the Great Smials. Hyacinth Took sent you to Needlehole to acquire brimstone and iron filings from the dwarf-merc…
Lobelia Sackville-Baggins is at her home at Bag End in Hobbiton. With your help, Hyacinth Took now has all she needs to begin work on Lobelia Sackvill…
